joke: My phone autocorrected "I love you" to "I lava you." Now I'm dating a volcano.

A banana walks into a bar. The bartender says, "We don't serve fruit here." The banana replies, "But I'm not just any fruit—I'm a *stand-up* banana!" The bartender sighs, "Fine, but make it quick. What's your act?" The banana nervously says, "Uh... why did the banana go to the doctor? Because it wasn't *peeling* well!"
Why did the sandwich go to the doctor? Because it felt a bit *bunned* over!
Why did the rain cloud get fired? Because it kept raining on everyone's parade!
Why don't penguins like to argue? Because they always end up *ice*-olated!
Why did Napoleon keep his army in the fridge? Because he wanted to keep them on ice!
Why did the clock get arrested? Because it was doing time!
Why did the stapler get promoted? It always knew how to punch above its weight!
Why did the sun go to school? To get a little brighter!
Why did the sock go to therapy? Because it felt unpaired!
Why did the astronaut break up with the moon? Because it was too distant!
Why did the heart go to the gym? Because it wanted to work on its cardio!
Why did the silence get a promotion? Because it never said anything wrong!
Why did the painter get fired? Because he kept drawing the line!
Why did the emotion feel blue? Because it was feeling down!
Why did the rock refuse to fight? Because it was too hard-headed!
Why did nothing go to the party? Because it was afraid of being a real gas!
Why did the comedian quit? Because the audience kept rejecting punchlines!
Why did nothing go to the party? Because it was afraid of being a real gas!
Why did nothing go to the party? Because it was afraid of being a real gas!
Why did nothing go to the party? Because it was afraid of being a real gas!
Why did everything go to the party? Because it was afraid of being left out!
Why did the void go to therapy? It heard the audience was tough.
Why did the door get a promotion? Because it always knew how to make an entrance!
Why did nothing exist? Because it couldn't find a reason to be!
Why did the comedian get rejected? Because the audience kept rejecting punchlines!
Why did the topic get rejected? Because it was too on point!
Why did the topic get rejected? Because it was too on point!
Why did the math book look sad? Because it had too many problems!
Why did the philosopher break up with the logician? Because they couldn't find common ground!
